# CloudLedger Resources Domain API <sup>`v1.0.0`</sup>

`OpenAPI 3.0.3`

> The CloudLedger Resources domain вЂ” the read surface over the AWS inventory the
> Collector aggregates into Postgres. Read-only: this API never mutates an AWS resource.
>
>   * /resources вЂ” resourcesapi (EC2 В· S3 В· RDS В· Lambda inventory)

## Servers

- `{scheme}://{host}:{port}` вЂ” resources (local)

## resources:resources

<details>
<summary>рџџ¦ <code>GET</code> <code>/resources/resources</code> вЂ” List inventory resources</summary>

The aggregated AWS resources, newest sweep first. Filter by `service`, `account_id`, `region`, or a free-text `q` matched against name and ARN. Excludes soft-deleted rows unless `include_deleted=true`.

<sub>Operation ID: <code>resources_listResources</code></sub>

**Parameters**

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `X-Api-Version`<br><sub>string В· header</sub> | (default: `1`) |
| `page`<br><sub>integer (int32) В· query</sub> | (default: `1`; min 1) |
| `page_size`<br><sub>integer (int32) В· query</sub> | (default: `50`; min 1; max 200) |
| `service`<br><sub>string В· query</sub> | Only resources for this AWS service. (enum: `ec2`, `s3`, `rds`, `lambda`) |
| `account_id`<br><sub>integer (int64) В· query</sub> | вЂ” |
| `region`<br><sub>string В· query</sub> | вЂ” |
| `q`<br><sub>string В· query</sub> | Case-insensitive substring matched against name and ARN. |
| `include_deleted`<br><sub>boolean В· query</sub> | (default: `false`) |

**Responses**

| Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| рџџ© `200` | A page of resources. |
| рџџ§ `401` | Missing or invalid bearer token. |

рџџ© `200` response body:

<sub>Content-Type</sub> `application/json`

Schema: [ResourcePage](#schema-resourcepage)

рџџ§ `401` response body:

<sub>Content-Type</sub> `application/json`

Schema: [Error](#schema-error)

</details>
